uuid.description: The UUID of the I-9 authorization

form_uuid.description: The UUID of the Form associated with this I-9 authorization. Use this with "Employee Forms" API endpoints.

version.description: The current version of the object. See the [versioning guide](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/idempotency) for information on how to use this field.

has_document_number.description: Whether or not a `document_number` exists for this document.

employer_signed.description: Whether the employer has signed the Form I-9

employee_signed.description: Whether the employee has signed the Form I-9

alt_procedure.description: Whether an alternative procedure authorized by DHS to examine documents was used

404.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.
